themes.label: Guidance
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes leading, direction, teaching, or the path God sets before His people. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "What does God choosing a longer path to avoid premature testing teach about trusting His timing?". Word-study detail reinforces "נָחָ֣ם: led - to guide; by implication, to transport (into exile, or as colonists)".
